name: sunoflow-mobile
comment: expo is pinned to the SDK; everything else floats to '*' and is aligned by `npx expo install --fix` after `pnpm install` (see README). Audio engine = expo-audio (free, New-Arch, lock-screen + background). track-player was dropped: v4 has no New Arch (Expo SDK 56 forces it) and v5 is commercially licensed. UNTESTED scaffold.
